_publications._publicationTitle: Genetic modifiers of neurofibromatosis type 1-associated café-au-lait macule count identified using multi-platform analysis.

_contextSnippet: By sequencing these five genes in the DISC sample set and performing simple linear and tiled regression analyses...we identified thirteen variants in the genomic regions of MSH6 and two near DPH2 and ATP6V0B that were significantly associated with CALM count
details: Successfully identified thirteen variants in MSH6 and two near DPH2 and ATP6V0B that were significantly associated with CALM count
